title: cf-access-wall spec
description: Declarative, PII-optional spec for putting a set of hostnames behind Cloudflare Access (Zero Trust). The spec instance lives in the PROJECT repo (it may carry team emails); this schema is the agnostic contract. Idempotent executor: ../scripts/setup-access.mjs

account_id.description: Cloudflare account id that owns the hostnames.

vault_scope.description: SCS vault scope holding cf.api_token (scoped: Access apps/policies + IdPs + orgs + service tokens, Edit) and receiving minted service-token credentials.

org.description: Zero Trust org (team domain). Omit if the account already has one — the executor GETs first and never overwrites.

team_domain_candidates.description: Tried in order until one is globally available; '.cloudflareaccess.com' is appended.

onetimepin.description: Built-in emailed 6-digit code — the non-technical path; zero external setup.

github.description: GitHub IdP; the OAuth app is forged separately (gh-oauth-app.mjs) with callback https://<team>.cloudflareaccess.com/cdn-cgi/access/callback.

service_tokens.description: Non-browser clients (CLIs, CI). Minted once; client_id/secret land in the vault scope under the DOT-separated paths service_token.<name>.client_id|client_secret.

domain.description: Hostname to protect. *.workers.dev works directly (verified 2026-07-23) — no zone or custom domain required.

session_duration.description: Per-app session. Field-device apps (e.g. a chairside recorder) warrant the 730h maximum so in-field links never re-auth mid-task.

allow_emails.description: The allow-list. Covers BOTH login paths: OTP asserts the typed email; GitHub asserts the account's verified email — list every identity a person may arrive with.

service_token_names.description: Service tokens (by name from service_tokens) granted a non_identity policy on this app.
